What do you think of dbgt's
new layout?
 
 
Layout Revision: 02/04/2004
Website Founded: 1997
Webmaster: Jamjar
Founded By: Ruben Rodas
Live Stats: 13 users online

Anime Review Writer Needed & FanArt
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 31st March, 2004 at 21:28 GMT
  
I've added three new images to the fanart section, they're pretty good and worth checking out. The main subject however; is the anime reviews section. Things are going fairly well, however we need another anime review author to help spread the workload. If you are interested and have a fair ammount of experience; please drop me an e-mail with your details and a piece of work you have done in the past. Thanks.
Resources Section
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Sunday 28th March, 2004 at 19:50 GMT
  
I have added a resources section to the gallery, when completed it will contain lots of useful downloads for multimedia develipers. So far I have added a few video editing programs. I hope you find them useful, Thanks.

*Resources Section
Media Streaming
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Thursday 25th March, 2004 at 17:04 GMT
  
Now all the images and roms have been moved onto the main site, the media server should be much faster. I have enabled the option for streaming; so you can now watch video clips and music videos online. I'm in the process of re-encoding the video clips at a higher quality, hopefully they will be ready within the next couple of weeks. Thanks.
Anime Reviews
 

Posted By: Dante
Date: Monday 22nd March, 2004 at 22:35 GMT
  
Since Jamjar got the anime review section up he asked me if I could do reviews and of course I could since I was just a anime news poster before. Anyways one of the first reviews on the new anime review section will be a review of the yet so popular .Hack//SIGN anime. Other anime reviews I will write are Trigun, Inuyasha, and if I have time FLCL. Until then I'm out--
Multimedia Reviewed
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Monday 22nd March, 2004 at 17:50 GMT
  
I have re-arranged the multimedia section top hopefully distribute the server load more evenly among out two servers. The media server will now be used just for videos and large files. The image cels have been moved to this webserver allowing you to browse through them quickly, without being slowed down by the people downloading multimedia. The media server is currently down for a few updates, however once it is up, you will be able to stream videos from it and download files at a higher speed. I hope you like the changes.
Long Time Over Due
 

Posted By: Valix
Date: Saturday 20th March, 2004 at 17:23 GMT
  
I have been gone for a long time and yet I'am still a hard worker for dbgt.com. There are some new avatars done by me in the miscellaneous section. On another note I have a new avatar as well. Dbgt fans enjoy all those new avatars there are more on the way.
New Layout Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 20th March, 2004 at 16:08 GMT
  
Hey, I finally manged to find some time to put the new layout up, It's fairly simple; I hope you like it. I'm going to think of something to put at the top between the nav and the content because it looks quite plain at the moment. I'm working on some new content, and I've got some ready for uploading. When I find some time, I'll do one big upload. Thanks.
New Layout Coming Soon
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 17th March, 2004 at 17:52 GMT
  
I appologize for not updating much recently; I've been over-run with school work, and I have been working on a new layout for dbgt. We have had the current layout for almost a year now, and I thought it was time for a change. Hopefully it will be ready in the next few day, but it might be a bit longer before all the content is edited to fit. Don't worry if you see a few things of place arround the site, it's just the upgrade taking place. I will have some more video clips by the end of the week, so stick arround. Thanks.
Ripped Information
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Tuesday 9th March, 2004 at 15:29 GMT
  
A website by the name of evil-anime has ripped off the in-house media server tutorial I wrote a couple of weeks back. I have emailed the webmaster asking him to take the tutorial down. However, if he refuses to comply; feel free to spam his ass.

*The Link
*The Screenshot
More Music Videos
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 28th February, 2004 at 15:24 GMT
  
Hey, I've added a few more music videos to the gallery, they're pretty good and well worth a download. Also; if you are a music video developer and would like your music videos displayed on dbgt; just drop me an email and we may be able to sort something out. I'm also thinking up an anime review section at dbgt.com; if you have any ideas or comments you can email them to me. Hope you enjoy the music videos, Thanks :)

*New Music Videos
DBGT On Saturday
 

Posted By: Soultaker
Date: Wednesday 25th February, 2004 at 13:47 GMT
  
Beginning Saturday, March 6th, Dragon Ball GT will air on CARTOON NETWORK at 9:30 PM (EST). Be sure to tune in the entire month of March and into April, as Dragon Ball GT will begin airing Episode 21, The Source of General Rilldo’s Power.
Source: DB-Unlimited
>.< Back
 

Posted By: Soultaker
Date: Tuesday 24th February, 2004 at 20:40 GMT
  
Well I spoke to JamJar earlier yesterday morning and decided to come back to DBGT. As my first act as new Staff Member is to say the alleged Death of Akira Toryiama is incorrect, I e-mailed the Public relations department of both Bird Studios and FUNImation and they both denied the rumour. The Staff member who posted that that Rumour has now been removed from the DBGT staff, We appologise for any inconvenience caused.Well Until next time I bid you all a good day!
Useful Programs
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Monday 23rd February, 2004 at 18:06 GMT
  
Hey, i've compiled a list of useful progams, If you're a webbie or or just enjoy browsing the web; take a look; hopefully you will find something of use there. I'll add a few more progams onto the list as I test them out.

*Useful Programs
Media Hosting Solution
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 20th February, 2004 at 10:50 GMT
  
A couple of days ago I added an article on how to setup your own media server. You might find it usefull if you are small site having trouble finding media hosting, or you simply find media hosting to be to expensive. There are a few requirements on the bahalf of your computer; all is explained in the article.

*Media Hosting Solution
I've Returned....
 

Posted By: The Prophecy
Date: Wednesday 18th February, 2004 at 23:32 GMT
  
I have left you people pondering about me long enough, I'm going to be the article writer once again, thanks in part to Jam's commitment to the site, we are keeping things rolling once again. The Dark ages of DBGT are close to an end.

Peace
New Content System
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 18th February, 2004 at 10:43 GMT
  
I spent most of yesterday engineering a content management system for dbgt. It allows our staff to easily add content whenever they want, which was much easier that the old routine; where that had to email it to me, and then wait for me to upload it. Therefore you should be seeing alot more from dbgt in the time to come. I also intent to continue developing my content management script, and put it up as a free download. Thnx.
Return Of A Staff Member // Reminders
 

Posted By: Valix
Date: Monday 16th February, 2004 at 17:36 GMT
  
A breath of fresh air. I know I know long time no see right...well jamjar has entice me back to the staff don't know how but he did it. I will be helping out from time to time on graphics. Also check out the anime news section for updates on your favorite anime shows:
Anime News
Two New Free Layouts
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Monday 16th February, 2004 at 12:32 GMT
  
Hey, I've added two new free layouts to the free stuff section. One of them is modern looking, and the other is in a dark anime style. If your stuck for ideas, or have run out of creativity juice, take a look. I'm working on a new one at the moment, it should be finished quite soon. I hope you like them, if you have any questions, please don't hesitate to email me.

*FREE LAYOUTS
More Updates
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Sunday 15th February, 2004 at 20:55 GMT
  
Hey, I've been working all weekend on the site, mainly fixing and modifying things. I fixed the html tester, and added a few more buttons to the free buttons section. I've added an opinion poll, and a banner rotator to the site, and I have setup the anime news script. Some more content will be added once I've sorted everything out.
A Few Updates
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 14th February, 2004 at 15:41 GMT
  
Hey, Im just updating a few things around the website. If some stuff doesn't work, don't worry because it is only temporary. The offer for new staff is still open, if you are interested just drop me an email.
